name: Band One Arm Front Raise
shortDescription: Isolation shoulder exercise raising one arm forward against band resistance to target the anterior deltoid.
instructions: Stand on the band with feet shoulder-width apart and hold one handle with your working hand by your side. Keeping your arm straight but not locked, raise it in front of you to shoulder level. Pause, then slowly lower back down with control. Repeat on both sides.
steps: Stand with one foot on the band for resistance.
Hold handle in one hand at thigh level, palm facing down.
Keep arm straight, raise it forward to shoulder height.
Lower arm back down slowly and repeat.
breathing: Exhale as you lift, inhale as you lower.
